title: cissampelos pareira var. owariensis
intro: Cissampelos pareira var. owariensis, also known as Pareira brava, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cissampelos pareira var. owariensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
